basic_details.job_title: UPSSSC Fireman Recruitment 2026 Online Link Activated - Apply Online for 170 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission (UPSSSC), Lucknow
basic_details.post_name: Vidhan Bhavan Rakshak (Council House Guard) & Vidhan Bhavan Agnik/Agnirakshak (Fireman/Fire Guard)
basic_details.department: Secretariat Administration Department, Government of Uttar Pradesh
basic_details.short_information: UPSSSC is recruiting 170 posts (Vidhan Bhavan Rakshak: 120, Vidhan Bhavan Agnik/Agnirakshak: 50) with High School (10th Pass) qualification under PET-2025 shortlisting, last date 29 June 2026.

important_dates.physical measurement & physical efficien: To be notified after Written Exam result

application_fee.details: Candidates are required to pay the prescribed fee through online mode only (Credit Card / Debit Card / Internet Banking / UPI / SBI e-Challan). Fee once paid will NOT be refunded. The registration process is complete only after successful fee reconciliation. Candidates must download and print their application form after fee reconciliation. The Main Examination fee is to be paid separately by shortlisted candidates before downloading the admit card. | Note: Freedom Fighter Dependants, Ex-Servicemen, Women, PwBD, and Outstanding Sportspersons candidates pay fee as per their base category (UR/OBC/SC/ST) as listed above. Main Examination fee is separate and will be paid only by shortlisted candidates at the time of admit card download. | DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.details: As per UP Secretariat Security and Fire Services Rules, 2000 (as amended), candidates must have attained 18 years of age and must not be above 40 years of age as on the first day of July of the calendar year in which direct recruitment vacancies are notified. Age relaxation in upper limit is applicable as per UP Government norms for reserved categories.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the last date of application (29-06-2026). Only Indian Citizens are eligible to apply. Candidates must have appeared in PET-2025 and hold a valid Score Card issued by UPSSSC. Candidates who scored zero or negative marks in PET-2025 (absolute or normalised) will not be shortlisted for the Main Examination.
qualification.education_qualification: Intermediate (Class 12th / High School equivalent) pass from Madhyamik Shiksha Parishad, Uttar Pradesh or equivalent examination recognised by the Government — as per UP Secretariat Security and Fire Services Rules, 2000 (as amended up to 5th Amendment 2023), Part-4, Rule-8.
qualification.domicile: Candidates not domiciled in Uttar Pradesh are NOT eligible for reservation benefits; they will be treated as Unreserved (UR) category.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-3, Pay Band: Rs. 21,700/- (Minimum) to Rs. 69,100/- (Maximum)

selection_process: Selection will be made strictly on merit through the following stages. There is no interview. Final engagement is subject to document verification and satisfactory conduct.
Stage 1 – Shortlisting Based on PET-2025 Normalised Score
Candidates will be shortlisted for the Main Examination based on their PET-2025 normalised score in a ratio of 15 times the number of advertised vacancies (category-wise)
including all candidates up to the cut-off normalised score (up to 2 decimal places).
Qualifying in nature. Candidates meeting the prescribed physical standards (height
weight as applicable) will be permitted to appear for the Written Main Examination.

duration 2 hours (120 minutes). Objective and multiple-choice type. Each question carries 1 mark. Negative marking: 1/4th mark (0.25) deducted for each wrong answer. Merit list prepared category-wise in descending order of written exam marks.
Candidates shortlisted on the basis of Written Main Examination merit will be called for document verification. Final selection is subject to verification of all eligibility documents.

pattern_table.Subject: History of India & Indian National Movement
Economic and Social Development of India
Current Events of National and International Importance
Knowledge of Concepts of Computer & Information Technology and Contemporary Technological Development & Innovation
General Information related to the State of Uttar Pradesh

exam_pattern.details: The written Main Examination will consist of a single objective-type paper with 100 questions carrying 100 marks in a total duration of 2 hours (120 minutes). There is negative marking of 1/4th mark for every wrong answer.

syllabus.details: Part-1 | (1) History of India and Indian National Movement: Social, cultural, economic and political aspects of Indian history. The Indian National Movement — freedom movement, rise of nationalism, and attainment of independence. | (2) Geography of India and World: Physical, social and economic geography of India; agriculture, horticulture, forestry, animal husbandry, population and urbanization patterns, Smart Cities and Smart Villages. General information about world geography. | (3) Economic and Social Development of India: Sustainable development, poverty alleviation, demography, social sector initiatives. Candidates will be tested on the relationship and problems between population, environment and urbanization. | (4) Indian Polity and Indian Constitution: Constitutional development in India, Indian Constitution, Indian political system and governance, Panchayati Raj and local self-government, public policy and official issues, community development. | (5) General Science and Technology: General understanding and knowledge of science including topics related to everyday experience and observation. Application of India's Science and Technology policy in everyday life, development and national security. Achievements of Indians in science and technology, indigenization, new technologies, dual-use and technologically useful technologies. | (6) Environmental Ecology and Disaster Management: General information on environmental ecology, biodiversity and climate change. Disasters in India, disaster mitigation and management. Disaster Management Act-2005, NDMA, SDMA, NDRF, SDRF and various agencies working in disaster management in India. | (7) Sports in India: Rules and general information related to athletics, judo, kabaddi, volleyball, badminton, wrestling, weightlifting, football, swimming, kho-kho etc. Efforts and achievements for promotion of sports in India. | (8) Current Events of National and International Importance: Knowledge of recent important developments at both national and international levels. | Part-2 – Computer and Information Technology | History, introduction and application of Computer, Information Technology, Internet and WWW. General knowledge on Hardware and Software, Input and Output, Internet Protocol/IP Address, IT gadgets and their applications, creation of e-mail ID and its use/operation, operation of Printer/Tablet/Mobile, important elements of MS-Word and MS-Excel, Operating System, Social Networking, e-Governance. Digital Financial Tools and Applications. Future Skills and Cyber Security. Technological Development and Innovation in the field of Computer and IT (Artificial Intelligence, Big Data Processing, Deep Learning, Machine Learning, Internet of Things) and India's achievements in this field. | Part-3 – General Information related to the State of Uttar Pradesh | History of Uttar Pradesh, Culture, Art, Architecture, Festivals, Folk Dances, Literature, Regional Languages, Heritage, Social Customs and Tourism, Geographical Landscape and Environment, Natural Resources, Climate, Soil, Forests, Wildlife, Mines and Minerals, Economy, Agriculture, Industry, Business and Employment, Polity and Administration, Current Events and achievements of Uttar Pradesh State in various fields.

physical_eligibility.details: Physical measurement is mandatory and qualifying in nature. Only candidates who pass the Physical Measurement Test (PMT) will appear for the Written Main Examination. The merit list for final selection will be prepared solely on the basis of Written Main Examination marks of candidates who meet the physical standards.

how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only; no other mode of application will be accepted. Applications must be submitted through the official UPSSSC website (upsssc.gov.in) using PET-2025 Registration Number and OTP sent to the registered mobile/email. Candidates must read the detailed advertisement and application instructions carefully before filling the form.
Visit upsssc.gov.in and go to the Live Advertisement Segment on the Homepage.
Click on the relevant advertisement and login using PET-2025 Registration Number + OTP.

Personal details registered during PET-2025 (name, father's/mother's name, UP domicile, category, EWS, horizontal reservation details, DOB, gender, marital status, contact details) will auto-populate.
Select the post(s) you wish to apply for and indicate post preference.
Provide educational qualification details (board name, year of passing, certificate/roll number, certificate issue date, marks details).
Select Yes/No for desirable (additional) qualification and provide details if applicable.
Provide correspondence address and other details; verify, enter verification code, and click Submit.
Pay prescribed fee online (Credit Card / Debit Card / Internet Banking / UPI / SBI e-Challan) and complete fee reconciliation.
Download and print the submitted application form; keep it safely for future use.
Corrections in the application (permitted fields only) can be made up to 06-07-2026 via the Modify Application option using PET-2025 Registration Number + OTP.

Fields that can be corrected after submission (up to 06-07-2026): Correspondence address; EWS and horizontal reservation category details (DFF, PwBD/PH, Ex-Servicemen, Gender, Outstanding Sportsperson); qualification details entered in the form; marital status.
For online application queries, contact UPSSSC at: https://upsssc.gov.in (on any working day) or visit the Commission's office during working hours.
important_instructions: Only candidates who appeared in PET-2025 and hold a valid PET-2025 Score Card issued by UPSSSC are eligible to apply for the Main Examination. Candidates who scored zero or negative marks (absolute or normalised) in PET-2025 will NOT be shortlisted for the Main Examination. Shortlisting for Main Examination will be done category-wise at a ratio of 15 times the number of advertised vacancies based on PET-2025 normalised scores. The Physical Measurement Test (PMT) is qualifying and mandatory; only PMT-qualified candidates will sit the Written Main Examination. All UP reserved category candidates (SC/ST/OBC/EWS) must mention their category in the application; candidates claiming benefits of multiple reserved categories will be entitled to only the one most beneficial reservation. Candidates not domiciled in Uttar Pradesh will be treated as Unreserved (UR) and will not get any reservation benefits. OBC Creamy Layer candidates are not eligible for OBC reservation; they must apply as General (UR). EWS candidates must hold a valid EWS certificate issued between 01-04-2026 and 29-06-2026, based on income for FY 2025-26 and valid for FY 2026-27, in the format prescribed by UP Government (office letter No. 0-3/2019/4/1/2002/ka-2/19TSI-II dated 14-03-2019). PwBD (Divyangjan) candidates must update their disability sub-category in the application as per the latest UP Government notifications on horizontal reservation for PwBD (GO No. 3/2021/324/2021/65-3-2021-78/99TI0SI0 dated 30-07-2021 and subsequent GOs). Ex-Servicemen / Disabled Ex-Servicemen who will be discharged from service by the last date of application (29-06-2026) are eligible for Ex-Servicemen reservation as per applicable UP Acts. Outstanding Sportspersons must produce a certificate from a competent authority in the format prescribed under UP Govt Notification dated 07-01-2022 (Niyamavali-2022 and subsequent GOs) to claim sportsperson reservation. Female UP candidates will be placed in the same category to which they belong; caste certificate from the father's side is the only accepted document for female UP candidates. Date of birth as recorded in the High School or equivalent certificate will be the only accepted date of birth; no other document will be entertained. In case of multiple applications submitted, only the last finally submitted application will be accepted; fees paid for other registrations will be forfeited. The Commission does not communicate individually with candidates; all information is published on upsssc.gov.in only. Candidates must visit the website regularly. Canvassing in any form will result in disqualification. Copying, use of unfair means, or misconduct in the examination hall will lead to cancellation and debarment from all UPSSSC examinations/selections. Provisions of UP Public Examinations (Prevention of Unfair Means) Act, 2024 dated 06-08-2024 will apply. The Commission's decision on eligibility is final. Any ambiguity, error, or omission will be resolved as per the relevant UP service rules and reservation enactments.

faq.question: Q1. What is UPSSSC Fireman Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: UPSSSC Fireman Recruitment 2026 is a government job notification released by the Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission for eligible candidates. A total of 170 Fireman vacancies have been announced under this recruitment drive. Interested candidates can apply online through the official UPSSSC website before the last date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in UPSSSC Fireman Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 170 vacancies have been released for Fireman and related posts including Vidhan Bhawan Rakshak and Fire Guard. These posts are distributed across different categories as per government reservation rules. This recruitment offers a good opportunity for candidates seeking Uttar Pradesh government jobs.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for UPSSSC Fireman Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Intermediate (12th) examination from a recognized board or equivalent qualification approved by the government. Preference may be given to candidates having NCC ‘B’ Certificate or Territorial Army experience. Applicants must ensure they meet all eligibility conditions before applying online.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for UPSSSC Fireman Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age required for applying is 18 years, while the maximum age limit is 40 years as on the specified date. Age relaxation will be applicable for reserved categories as per UPSSSC government rules. Candidates should check the official notification for complete age relaxation details.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for UPSSSC Fireman Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹25 for all categories including General, OBC, SC, ST, and PH candidates. The fee must be paid through online mode only while submitting the application form. Applications without successful fee payment will not be considered valid.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for UPSSSC Fireman Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for UPSSSC Fireman Recruitment 2026 includes a written examination followed by physical efficiency test and document verification. Candidates must qualify in each stage to move forward in the selection process. Final merit will be prepared based on overall performance.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for UPSSSC Fireman posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive salary under Pay Level-3 of the pay matrix as per government norms. The monthly salary ranges from ₹21,700 to ₹69,100 along with additional allowances. This makes it a stable and attractive government job opportunity.

faq.question: Q8. What are the important dates for UPSSSC Fireman Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process starts on 09 June 2026 and continues until 29 June 2026. The notification was released on 10 April 2026 and candidates can make corrections until 06 July 2026. Applicants must complete the process before the deadline to avoid rejection.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for UPSSSC Fireman Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online by visiting the official website upsssc.gov.in and filling out the application form. They must upload required documents, pay the fee, and submit the form before the last date. It is important to verify all details carefully before final submission.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the UPSSSC Fireman Recruitment 2026 notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF is available on the UPSSSC website under the recruitment section for candidates to download. It includes complete details such as eligibility, vacancy, application process, and important instructions. Candidates are advised to read the PDF carefully before applying.
